chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1677 of 2024 M/S Contract Plus Versus Federation of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on Misc. No.16880/2024 (U/A). 2. For orders on Misc. No.16881/2024 (U/O-23 R-1 CPC). 3. For order on office objection. 4. For hearing on Misc. No.7616/2024 (Stay). 5. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 12.08.2024 Mr. Malik Naeem Iqbal, advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1). Urgency granted. 2). Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that on account of some out of court understanding, the petitioner has been advised not to press this petition. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
